mapper.select: SELECT * FROM gl_voucher_entry WHERE voucher_id = #{voucherId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY line_no
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO gl_voucher_entry ( voucher_id, line_no, account_id, account_code, account_name, abstract, debit_amount, credit_amount, currency, exchange_rate, dept_id, project_id, customer_id, supplier_id, employee_id ) VALUES
( #{entry.voucherId}, #{entry.lineNo}, #{entry.accountId}, #{entry.accountCode}, #{entry.accountName}, #{entry.abstract}, #{entry.debitAmount}, #{entry.creditAmount}, #{entry.currency}, #{entry.exchangeRate}, #{entry.deptId}, #{entry.projectId}, #{entry.customerId}, #{entry.supplierId}, #{entry.employeeId} )
mapper.delete: UPDATE gl_voucher_entry SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE voucher_id = #{voucherId}
